findings.evidence: `code/TauCeti/NumberTheory/NumberField/SplitsCompletely.lean:46:theorem algebraMap_int_mem_iff_dvd_of_liesOver {B : Type*} [CommRing B] {p : ℕ}`; existing generic precedent is `mathlib/Mathlib/RingTheory/Ideal/Over.lean:123:theorem mem_of_liesOver [P.LiesOver p]`.
findings.fix: Move/name it under the ideal/lies-over API, e.g. `Ideal.algebraMap_int_mem_iff_dvd_of_liesOver`, or keep it private/local if it is only a proof helper.
findings.issue: `TauCeti.NumberField.algebraMap_int_mem_iff_dvd_of_liesOver` is not number-field-specific: its statement only assumes `{B : Type*} [CommRing B]` and `Q.LiesOver (span {(p : ℤ)})`, so the `NumberField` namespace misclassifies a generic ideal API.

summary: One exported helper is a generic ideal/lies-over lemma but is introduced in the `TauCeti.NumberField` namespace, making the API misleading for its scope.
